Therapist: You've been feeling discouraged by past attempts, but you're committing to trying a new approach with the podcast idea. Can you think of a specific way to hold yourself accountable for trying out some new podcasts before your next long drive?

Patient: My husband's always on his phone, he could help me find some new stuff. I could ask him to download a few podcasts and we could listen to them together before my next drive. That way, I'll have some ideas and he can keep me company.

Therapist: Let's build on your idea of asking your husband to download some podcasts. Are you feeling more hopeful and confident that having his support will make it easier to stick with this new approach?
Patient: Yeah, I think so. Just knowing that he's willing to help me makes me feel like maybe, just maybe, this is the time it'll stick.
